mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INTERVIEW_ANSWERS ( ANSWER_ID, SESSION_ID, QUESTION_ID, QUESTION_TEXT, ANSWER_TEXT, VIDEO_PATH, SCORE, STRENGTHS, IMPROVEMENTS, PRONUNCIATION, BEHAVIOR, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{answerId}, #{sessionId}, #{questionId}, #{questionText}, #{answerText}, #{videoPath}, #{score}, #{strengths}, #{improvements}, #{pronunciation}, #{behavior}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT ANSWER_ID AS answerId, SESSION_ID AS sessionId, QUESTION_ID AS questionId, QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText, ANSWER_TEXT AS answerText, VIDEO_PATH AS videoPath, SCORE AS score, STRENGTHS AS strengths, IMPROVEMENTS AS improvements, PRONUNCIATION AS pronunciation, BEHAVIOR AS behavior, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM INTERVIEW_ANSWERS WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC

SELECT ANSWER_ID AS answerId, SESSION_ID AS sessionId, QUESTION_ID AS questionId, QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText, ANSWER_TEXT AS answerText, VIDEO_PATH AS videoPath, SCORE AS score, STRENGTHS AS strengths, IMPROVEMENTS AS improvements, PRONUNCIATION AS pronunciation, BEHAVIOR AS behavior, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM INTERVIEW_ANSWERS WHERE ANSWER_ID = #{answerId}
